name: Honey White Bread for Bread Machines
recipeInstructions:
1. Scald the milk in a saucepan over medium heat until it begins to bubble.
Remove from the heat and stir in the butter and honey until melted.
Allow the mixture to cool to room temperature.
2. In the order specified by your bread machine manual, add the cooled
milk mixture and all remaining ingredients.
3. Process on the basic bread cycle according to the manufacturer's directions.
The bread is delicious warm, at room temperature, or toasted. It tends to stale quickly,
so store the loaf well and use it promptly or freeze for later use.
Makes 1-1/2 pound loaf.
